(Amended) Notice Of Petitioner'S Motion For Default Jdugemnt And Motion For Order Compelling Respondents Toproduce The Adminstrative Record
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER THE RESORT AT INDIAN SPRINGS, LLC (Amended) Notice of Petitioner's Motion for Default Judgment and Motion for Order Compelling Respondents to produce the Administrative Record. David B. Porter, Esq. & Richard Tay, Esq. of Wood & Porter (415) 834-1800 appearing for Petitioner and Moving party; Anne Hipsman, Esq. Department of Labor, State of California (415) 703-4863 appearing for Respondent. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. Petitioner fails to establish that Respondent's answer was filed in an untimely manner under CCP section 1089.5. (The Court retains the Administrative Record and the Original Transcript.) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
